attributes.Sql Query:
---DAILY RATES AT ATTRIBUTED PRODUCT KEY LEVEL FOR TIME_BOUND_CRDT_APLD_FLG='Y'---

SELECT
'SBP_ACCRUALS' TRANSACTION_TYPE              
,WF_AT.RPO_FLG                       
,CAST((WI_ACRL.ACCRUAL_AMOUNT * (WF_AT.DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/100.000000) * COALESCE(CAST(WF_AT.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(26,16)),CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(26,16)))
*COALESCE(UNB_PCT,1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)
)AS UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT         
,WF_AT.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH          
,WF_AT.FISCAL_MTH                    
,WF_AT.SRC_ENTITY                    
,WF_AT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,WF_AT.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,WF_AT.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
,WF_AT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
,WF_AT.WEB_ORDER_ID                  
,WF_AT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,WF_AT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,WF_AT.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY         
,WF_AT.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              
,WF_AT.SERVICE_FLG                   
,WF_AT.CORP_FLG                      
,WF_AT.CONTRACT_START_DTM            
,WF_AT.CONTRACT_END_DTM              
,WF_AT.CONTRACT_TERM                 
,WF_AT.CONTRACT_NUM                  
,WF_AT.ERP_DEAL_ID                   
,WF_AT.AUTO_RELEASE_DT               
,WF_AT.FHI_BNI_FLG                   
,WF_AT.CISCO_BOOKED_DT               
,WF_AT.ORACLE_BOOK_DTM               
,WF_AT.PROCESS_DT                    
,WF_AT.SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT             
,WF_AT.HOLD_FLG                      
,WF_AT.EARLY_SHIP_FLG                
,WF_AT.SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG      
,WF_AT.CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT        
,WF_AT.EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,WF_AT.EDW_CREATE_USER               
,WF_AT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,WF_AT.EDW_UPDATE_USER               
,WF_AT.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY        
,WF_AT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
,WF_AT.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD         
,0 AS DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT      
,WF_AT.DD_FB_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        
,WF_AT.PL_CONVERSION_RATE            
,WF_AT.DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM  
,WF_AT.DD_FB_PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT 
,WF_AT.DD_FB_SS_CD                   
,WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY     
,WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID           
,WF_AT.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM           
,WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD
,WF_AT.INITIAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         
,WF_AT.RENEWAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         
,WF_AT.PREPAID_TERM_MTHS_CNT         
,WF_AT.RENEWAL_CNT                   
,WF_AT.BILLED_DAY_OF_THE_MTH_INT     
,WF_AT.OFFER_TYPE_CD                 
,WF_AT.BILLING_MODEL_NAME            
,WF_AT.SUBSCR_LINE_STATUS_CD         
,WF_AT.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_CD           
,WF_AT.ATTRIBUTION_PCT               
,WF_AT.SRC_CANCEL_DTM                
,WF_AT.CHARGE_TYPE_CD                
,WF_AT.ATO_NAME                      
,WF_AT.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT
,WF_AT.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_END_DT  
,WF_AT.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_START_DT   
,WF_AT.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_END_DT     
,WF_AT.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          
,WF_AT.DV_AR_ACCOUNTING_TERM_MTH_INT 
,WF_AT.DV_AVERAGE_TERM_MTH_INT       
,WF_AT.DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT            
,WF_AT.DV_WATERFALL_START_DT         
,WF_AT.DV_WATERFALL_END_DT           
,WF_AT.DV_WATERFALL_TERM_DAYS_INT    
,(SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID) FROM $$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_REVENUE_SBP_RPO) + ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY WF_AT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) AS TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID       
,WF_AT.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG          
,WF_AT.DV_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD     
,WF_AT.DV_ORDER_QUANTITY             
,WF_AT.DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT  
,WF_AT.DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT
--,WF_AT.FLEX_UP_RESV_LINE_FLG 
,WF_AT.ORDER_ORIGIN_CD
,WF_AT.DV_RPO_ACTIVE_FLG  
,WF_AT.PRED_BDOM
,WF_AT.DV_BILLING_CYCLE_ID
,WF_AT.DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT
,WF_AT.DV_PREDICTED_MONTH_BILL_DT
,WF_AT.DV_REM_TERM_MONTHS_CNT
,WF_AT.DV_MILESTONE_START_DT 
,WF_AT.DV_MILESTONE_END_DT
,WF_AT.PERIODIC_BILLING_START_DT
,WF_AT.PERIODIC_BILLING_END_DT
,WF_AT.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
,WF_AT.INVOICE_RELEASE_DATE_SOURCE_NAME 
,WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_CHARGE_CYCLE_START_DT
,WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_CHARGE_CYCLE_END_DT
,WF_AT.TOTAL_ORDER_VALUE_LOCAL_AMT
,WF_AT.BALANCE_LOCAL_AMOUNT
,WF_AT.DV_BALANCE_USD_AMOUNT
,WF_AT.PROJECTED_LOCAL_AMOUNT
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_REVENUE_SBP_RPO WF_AT
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ACRL_SUM_DATA_RPO WI_ACRL
 ON WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID = WI_ACRL.REF_CODE 
 AND WF_AT.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM = WI_ACRL.SUBSCRIPTION_CODE
 AND WF_AT.PRODUCT_KEY = WI_ACRL.DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY 
 AND WF_AT.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY = WI_ACRL.PRODUCT_KEY 
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_PCT UPCT
ON WF_AT.FISCAL_MTH=UPCT.FISCAL_MTH
AND WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID=UPCT.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID
AND WF_AT.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM=UPCT.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM
AND WF_AT.PRODUCT_KEY=UPCT.PRODUCT_KEY
AND WF_AT.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY=UPCT.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY
WHERE 
TRANSACTION_TYPE='SBP'
AND WI_ACRL.TIME_BOUND_CRDT_APLD_FLG='Y' 
AND WF_AT.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME IN ('Daily Rates','Daily Rates - NRST')

SELECT 
WIUN.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD AS  TRANSACTION_TYPE                                 
,WIUN.RPO_FLG AS RPO_FLG                        
,WIUN.UNBILLED_REVENUE_USD_AMT AS UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT      
,WIUN.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH          
,WIUN.FISCAL_MTH                    
,WIUN.SRC_ENTITY_NAME  AS SRC_ENTITY                   
,WIUN.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,WIUN.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,WIUN.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
,WIUN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
,WIUN.WEB_ORDER_ID                  
,WIUN.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,WIUN.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,WIUN.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY         
,WIUN.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              
,WIUN.SERVICE_FLG                   
,WIUN.CORP_FLG                      
,WIUN.CONTRACT_START_DTM            
,WIUN.CONTRACT_END_DTM              
,WIUN.CONTRACT_TERM                 
,WIUN.CONTRACT_NUM                  
,WIUN.ERP_DEAL_ID                   
,WIUN.AUTO_RELEASE_DT               
,WIUN.FHI_BNI_FLG                   
,WIUN.CISCO_BOOKED_DT               
,WIUN.ORACLE_BOOK_DTM               
,WIUN.PROCESS_DT                    
,WIUN.SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT             
,WIUN.HOLD_FLG                      
,WIUN.EARLY_SHIP_FLG                
,WIUN.SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG      
,WIUN.CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT        
,WIUN.EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,WIUN.EDW_CREATE_USER               
,WIUN.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,WIUN.EDW_UPDATE_USER               
,WIUN.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY        
,WIUN.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
,WIUN.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD         
,WIUN.DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT      
,WIUN.DD_FB_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        
,WIUN.PL_CONVERSION_RATE            
,WIUN.DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM  
,WIUN.DD_FB_PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT 
,WIUN.DD_FB_SS_CD                   
,WIUN.SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY     
,WIUN.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID           
,WIUN.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM           
,WIUN.SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD        
,WIUN.INITIAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         
,WIUN.RENEWAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         
,WIUN.PREPAID_TERM_MTHS_CNT         
,WIUN.RENEWAL_CNT                   
,WIUN.BILLED_DAY_OF_THE_MTH_INT     
,WIUN.OFFER_TYPE_CD                 
,WIUN.BILLING_MODEL_NAME            
,WIUN.SUBSCR_LINE_STATUS_CD         
,WIUN.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_CD 
,WIUN.DV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT AS ATTRIBUTION_PCT                              
,WIUN.SRC_CANCEL_DTM                
,WIUN.CHARGE_TYPE_CD                
,WIUN.ATO_NAME                      
,WIUN.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT --DEFINED AS NULL IN THE ORIGINAL CODE
,WIUN.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_END_DT  --DEFINED AS NULL IN THE ORIGINAL CODE
,WIUN.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_START_DT   --DEFINED AS NULL IN THE ORIGINAL CODE
,WIUN.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_END_DT     --DEFINED AS NULL IN THE ORIGINAL CODE
,WIUN.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
,WIUN.DV_AR_ACCOUNTING_TERM_MTH_INT           
,WIUN.DV_AVERAGE_TERM_MTH_INT                                  
,WIUN.DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT            
,WIUN.DV_WATERFALL_START_DT            
,WIUN.DV_WATERFALL_END_DT              
,WIUN.DV_WATERFALL_TERM_DAYS_INT                  
,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY WIUN.sales_order_line_key) AS TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID 
,WIUN.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG
,WIUN.DV_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD
,WIUN.DV_ORDER_QUANTITY
,WIUN.DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
,WIUN.DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT
,NSO.ORDER_ORIGIN_CD 
,WIUN.DV_RPO_ACTIVE_FLG AS DV_RPO_ACTIVE_FLG
,Extract(DAY From WIUN.DV_PREDICTED_MONTH_BILL_DT) AS PRED_BDOM
,DV_BILLING_CYCLE_ID
,DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT
,DV_PREDICTED_MONTH_BILL_DT
,DV_REM_TERM_MONTHS_CNT
,DV_MILESTONE_START_DT
,DV_MILESTONE_END_DT
,PERIODIC_BILLING_START_DT
,PERIODIC_BILLING_END_DT
,DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
,INVOICE_RELEASE_DATE_SOURCE_NAME 
,SUBSCRIPTION_CHARGE_CYCLE_START_DT
,SUBSCRIPTION_CHARGE_CYCLE_END_DT
,TOTAL_ORDER_VALUE_LOCAL_AMT
,BALANCE_LOCAL_AMOUNT
,DV_BALANCE_USD_AMOUNT
,PROJECTED_LOCAL_AMOUNT
FROM 
$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_UNBILLED_REVENUE_RPO_ENG WIUN
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
ON NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=WIUN.SALES_ORDER_KEY

SELECT
WI_ACRL.REF_CODE,
WI_ACRL.SUBSCRIPTION_CODE ,
WI_ACRL.PRODUCT_KEY ,
WI_ACRL.DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY , 
CAST(SUM((RU_DEBIT_TRXL_AMT-RU_CREDIT_TRXL_AMT)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS ACCRUAL_AMOUNT,
TIME_BOUND_CRDT_APLD_FLG
FROM $$STGDB.WI_ACRL_TRXNL_DATA_RPO WI_ACRL
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,6,7

-----IDENTIFYING ACCRUAL DATA FOR  TIME_BOUND_CRDT_APLD_FLG='N' AT ATTRIBUTED KEY LEVEL

 SELECT
  'SBP_ACCRUALS' AS TRANSACTION_TYPE ,
  WF_AT.RPO_FLG                       ,
  CAST((WI_ACRL.ACCRUAL_AMOUNT * (WF_AT.DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/100.000000) 
  * COALESCE(CAST(WF_AT.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(26,16)),CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(26,16)))* COALESCE(UNB_PCT,1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7))AS UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT ,
  WF_AT.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH          ,
  WF_AT.FISCAL_MTH                    ,
  WF_AT.SRC_ENTITY                    ,
  WF_AT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
  WF_AT.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
  WF_AT.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
  WF_AT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
  WF_AT.WEB_ORDER_ID                  ,
  WF_AT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
  WF_AT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
  WF_AT.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY         ,
  WF_AT.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              ,
  WF_AT.SERVICE_FLG                   ,
  WF_AT.CORP_FLG                      ,
  WF_AT.CONTRACT_START_DTM            ,
  WF_AT.CONTRACT_END_DTM              ,
  WF_AT.CONTRACT_TERM                 ,
  WF_AT.CONTRACT_NUM                  ,
  WF_AT.ERP_DEAL_ID                   ,
  WF_AT.AUTO_RELEASE_DT               ,
  WF_AT.FHI_BNI_FLG                   ,
  WF_AT.CISCO_BOOKED_DT               ,
  WF_AT.ORACLE_BOOK_DTM               ,
  WF_AT.PROCESS_DT                    ,
  WF_AT.SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT             ,
  WF_AT.HOLD_FLG                      ,
  WF_AT.EARLY_SHIP_FLG                ,
  WF_AT.SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG      ,
  WF_AT.CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT        ,
  WF_AT.EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
  WF_AT.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
  WF_AT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
  WF_AT.EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
  WF_AT.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY        ,
  WF_AT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             ,
  WF_AT.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD         ,
  WF_AT.DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT      ,
  WF_AT.DD_FB_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        ,
  WF_AT.PL_CONVERSION_RATE            ,
  WF_AT.DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM  ,
  WF_AT.DD_FB_PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT ,
  WF_AT.DD_FB_SS_CD                   ,
  WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY     ,
  WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID           ,
  WF_AT.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM           ,
  WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD        ,
  WF_AT.INITIAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
  WF_AT.RENEWAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
  WF_AT.PREPAID_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
  WF_AT.RENEWAL_CNT                   ,
  WF_AT.BILLED_DAY_OF_THE_MTH_INT     ,
  WF_AT.OFFER_TYPE_CD                 ,
  WF_AT.BILLING_MODEL_NAME            ,
  WF_AT.SUBSCR_LINE_STATUS_CD         ,
  WF_AT.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_CD           ,
  WF_AT.SRC_CANCEL_DTM                ,
  WF_AT.CHARGE_TYPE_CD                ,
  WF_AT.ATO_NAME                      ,
  WF_AT.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT,
  WF_AT.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_END_DT  ,
  WF_AT.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_START_DT   ,
  WF_AT.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_END_DT     ,
  WF_AT.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          ,
  WF_AT.DV_AR_ACCOUNTING_TERM_MTH_INT ,
  WF_AT.DV_AVERAGE_TERM_MTH_INT       ,
  WF_AT.DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT            ,
  WF_AT.DV_WATERFALL_START_DT         ,
  WF_AT.DV_WATERFALL_END_DT           ,
  WF_AT.DV_WATERFALL_TERM_DAYS_INT    ,
  WF_AT.DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT   ,
 CASE WHEN SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD IN ('Active','Renewed','Not Active','UNKNOWN') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DV_ACTIVE_FLG,
 WF_AT.DV_BILLING_CYCLE_ID           ,
 WF_AT.DV_PREDICTED_MONTH_BILL_DT    ,
 WF_AT.DV_REM_TERM_MONTHS_CNT        ,
 WF_AT.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG          ,
 CAST('' AS VARCHAR(50))AS DV_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD ,
 WF_AT.DV_MILESTONE_START_DT,
 WF_AT.DV_MILESTONE_END_DT,
 WF_AT.DV_ORDER_QUANTITY ,
 WF_AT.DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
 WF_AT.ATTRIBUTION_PCT,
 WF_AT.DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
 WF_AT.DV_RPO_ACTIVE_FLG
 ,WF_AT.PERIODIC_BILLING_START_DT
,WF_AT.PERIODIC_BILLING_END_DT
,WF_AT.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
 ,WF_AT.INVOICE_RELEASE_DATE_SOURCE_NAME 
,WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_CHARGE_CYCLE_START_DT
,WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_CHARGE_CYCLE_END_DT
,WF_AT.TOTAL_ORDER_VALUE_LOCAL_AMT
,WF_AT.BALANCE_LOCAL_AMOUNT
,WF_AT.DV_BALANCE_USD_AMOUNT
,WF_AT.PROJECTED_LOCAL_AMOUNT
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_REVENUE_SBP_RPO WF_AT
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ACRL_SUM_DATA_RPO WI_ACRL
 ON WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID = WI_ACRL.REF_CODE 
 AND WF_AT.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM = WI_ACRL.SUBSCRIPTION_CODE 
 AND WF_AT.PRODUCT_KEY = WI_ACRL.DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY 
 AND WF_AT.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY = WI_ACRL.PRODUCT_KEY 
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_PCT UPCT
 ON WF_AT.FISCAL_MTH=UPCT.FISCAL_MTH
 AND WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID=UPCT.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID
 AND WF_AT.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM=UPCT.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM
 AND WF_AT.PRODUCT_KEY=UPCT.PRODUCT_KEY
 AND WF_AT.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY=UPCT.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY
WHERE TRANSACTION_TYPE='SBP'
  AND WI_ACRL.TIME_BOUND_CRDT_APLD_FLG='N'
 QUALIFY  Row_Number() Over (PARTITION BY WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID ,WF_AT.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM,WF_AT.PRODUCT_KEY,WF_AT.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY,  WF_AT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ORDER BY WF_AT.FISCAL_MTH ASC)=1
 
 UNION ALL 
 
 SELECT
 'SBP_ACCRUALS' AS TRANSACTION_TYPE ,
 WF_AT.RPO_FLG                       ,
 CAST((WI_ACRL.ACCRUAL_AMOUNT * (WF_AT.DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/100.000000) * COALESCE(CAST(WF_AT.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(26,16)),CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(26,16))) * COALESCE(UNB_PCT,1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7))AS UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT ,
  WF_AT.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH          ,
  WF_AT.FISCAL_MTH                    ,
  WF_AT.SRC_ENTITY                    ,
  WF_AT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
  WF_AT.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
  WF_AT.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
  WF_AT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
  WF_AT.WEB_ORDER_ID                  ,
  WF_AT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
  WF_AT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
  WF_AT.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY         ,
  WF_AT.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              ,
  WF_AT.SERVICE_FLG                   ,
  WF_AT.CORP_FLG                      ,
  WF_AT.CONTRACT_START_DTM            ,
  WF_AT.CONTRACT_END_DTM              ,
  WF_AT.CONTRACT_TERM                 ,
  WF_AT.CONTRACT_NUM                  ,
  WF_AT.ERP_DEAL_ID                   ,
  WF_AT.AUTO_RELEASE_DT               ,
  WF_AT.FHI_BNI_FLG                   ,
  WF_AT.CISCO_BOOKED_DT               ,
  WF_AT.ORACLE_BOOK_DTM               ,
  WF_AT.PROCESS_DT                    ,
  WF_AT.SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT             ,
  WF_AT.HOLD_FLG                      ,
  WF_AT.EARLY_SHIP_FLG                ,
  WF_AT.SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG      ,
  WF_AT.CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT        ,
  WF_AT.EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
  WF_AT.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
  WF_AT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
  WF_AT.EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
  WF_AT.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY        ,
  WF_AT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             ,
  WF_AT.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD         ,
  WF_AT.DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT      ,
  WF_AT.DD_FB_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        ,
  WF_AT.PL_CONVERSION_RATE            ,
  WF_AT.DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM  ,
  WF_AT.DD_FB_PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT ,
  WF_AT.DD_FB_SS_CD                   ,
  WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY     ,
  WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID           ,
  WF_AT.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM           ,
  WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD        ,
  WF_AT.INITIAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
  WF_AT.RENEWAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
  WF_AT.PREPAID_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
  WF_AT.RENEWAL_CNT                   ,
  WF_AT.BILLED_DAY_OF_THE_MTH_INT     ,
  WF_AT.OFFER_TYPE_CD                 ,
  WF_AT.BILLING_MODEL_NAME            ,
  WF_AT.SUBSCR_LINE_STATUS_CD         ,
  WF_AT.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_CD           ,
  WF_AT.SRC_CANCEL_DTM                ,
  WF_AT.CHARGE_TYPE_CD                ,
  WF_AT.ATO_NAME                      ,
  WF_AT.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT,
  WF_AT.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_END_DT  ,
  WF_AT.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_START_DT   ,
  WF_AT.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_END_DT     ,
  WF_AT.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          ,
  WF_AT.DV_AR_ACCOUNTING_TERM_MTH_INT ,
  WF_AT.DV_AVERAGE_TERM_MTH_INT       ,
  WF_AT.DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT            ,
  WF_AT.DV_WATERFALL_START_DT         ,
  WF_AT.DV_WATERFALL_END_DT           ,
  WF_AT.DV_WATERFALL_TERM_DAYS_INT    ,
  WF_AT.DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT   ,
  CASE WHEN SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD IN ('Active','Renewed','Not Active','UNKNOWN') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DV_ACTIVE_FLG,
  WF_AT.DV_BILLING_CYCLE_ID           ,
  WF_AT.DV_PREDICTED_MONTH_BILL_DT    ,
  WF_AT.DV_REM_TERM_MONTHS_CNT        ,
  WF_AT.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG          ,
 CAST('' AS VARCHAR(50))AS DV_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD ,
  WF_AT.DV_MILESTONE_START_DT,
  WF_AT.DV_MILESTONE_END_DT,
  WF_AT.DV_ORDER_QUANTITY ,
  WF_AT.DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
  WF_AT.ATTRIBUTION_PCT,
  WF_AT.DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
  WF_AT.DV_RPO_ACTIVE_FLG  
  ,WF_AT.PERIODIC_BILLING_START_DT
,WF_AT.PERIODIC_BILLING_END_DT
,WF_AT.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
  ,WF_AT.INVOICE_RELEASE_DATE_SOURCE_NAME 
,WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_CHARGE_CYCLE_START_DT
,WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_CHARGE_CYCLE_END_DT
,WF_AT.TOTAL_ORDER_VALUE_LOCAL_AMT
,WF_AT.BALANCE_LOCAL_AMOUNT
,WF_AT.DV_BALANCE_USD_AMOUNT
,WF_AT.PROJECTED_LOCAL_AMOUNT
 FROM
$$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_REVENUE_SBP_RPO WF_AT
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ACRL_SUM_DATA_RPO WI_ACRL
 ON WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID = WI_ACRL.REF_CODE 
 AND WF_AT.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM = WI_ACRL.SUBSCRIPTION_CODE
 AND WF_AT.PRODUCT_KEY = WI_ACRL.DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY 
 AND WF_AT.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY = WI_ACRL.PRODUCT_KEY 
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_PCT UPCT
 ON WF_AT.FISCAL_MTH=UPCT.FISCAL_MTH
 AND WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID=UPCT.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID
 AND WF_AT.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM=UPCT.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM
 AND WF_AT.PRODUCT_KEY=UPCT.PRODUCT_KEY
 AND WF_AT.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY=UPCT.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY
 WHERE TRANSACTION_TYPE='SBP'
  AND WI_ACRL.TIME_BOUND_CRDT_APLD_FLG='Y' 
  AND WF_AT.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME NOT IN ('Daily Rates','Daily Rates - NRST')
 QUALIFY  Row_Number() Over (PARTITION BY WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID ,WF_AT.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM,WF_AT.PRODUCT_KEY,WF_AT.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY,WF_AT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY--, WF_AT.FLEX_UP_RESV_LINE_FLG 
 ORDER BY WF_AT.FISCAL_MTH ASC)=1
